content.verdict: The Nautilus is the Maldives at its most unapologetically bespoke — only 26 private houses and residences in Baa Atoll, each with a butler, a pool, and a written 'no schedules' philosophy. There are no set meal times and no menus — you decide what, when, and where. For honeymooners craving total control over their days, it is peerless.
content.best_room: The Ocean Residence — two bedrooms, infinity pool, dedicated deck and staff quarters for your butler. If two bedrooms is overkill, the Ocean House delivers the same experience in a one-bedroom overwater footprint with private pool.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Seaplane Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 35-minute seaplane from Malé. Private yacht welcome, butler introduction, slow evening in your residence.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Your Day, Your Way
itinerary_7_nights.description: Breakfast whenever (and wherever) you like, butler-arranged snorkel to the house reef, dinner at Ocaso with Latin American small plates.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Ocean Safari
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private boat to Hanifaru Bay for manta rays (June–Nov) or a dolphin-spotting cruise, lobster lunch on deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wellness Ritual
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day spa journey with your chosen therapist, in-residence yoga on the pool deck, Chef's Table degustation dinner at Zeytin.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Sandbank Wedding Vow Renewal
itinerary_7_nights.description: Arranged by butler — sandbank ceremony with flowers, Champagne, photographer. Night: in-villa beach bonfire.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Slow Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Read, swim, nap repeat. Butler brings whatever you want whenever. Dinner at Naiboli pool bar with Champagne pairing.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Floating breakfast in the pool, final reef swim, seaplane back to Malé.

caveats: Very high price point — one of the most expensive in Maldives
Remote location means fewer off-island excursions
No scheduled activities means less social energy for those wanting groups

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — arguably the most personalised honeymoon experience in the Maldives thanks to the no-schedule, butler-led philosophy.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: June–November for manta season at nearby Hanifaru Bay; December–April for classic dry-season weather.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 6 months, often longer for peak weeks.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but residences are so private it feels adults-only.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Ocean House for honeymoons; Ocean Residence if you want extra space.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: 35-minute seaplane transfer from Velana International Airport (MLE).
